meta.paper: Towards Trustworthy RL: Explainable RL with Multi-Level Safety for Real-Time 6G Service Provision

normal.label: V1 — Normal Operation
normal.description: Full framework running smoothly. Ensemble makes all decisions with high confidence. No fallback or shield activation needed.

fallback.label: V1 — Fallback Policy Activated
fallback.description: Ensemble uncertainty exceeds threshold during a critical URLLC state. The Fallback Policy takes over, serving the URLLC user with the longest waiting time deterministically.

shield.label: V1 — Safety Shield Activated
shield.description: The ensemble proposes an action that would violate URLLC constraints. The Safety Shield intercepts and overrides it with the safe alternative.

baseline.label: B1 — Vanilla DQN (No Safety)
baseline.description: Single DQN agent with no safety layers. No ensemble, no fallback, no shield. URLLC packets miss deadlines under stressed conditions.
